__fixture__.summary: A dialog, sheet, or child window would reopen off-screen because its prior monitor or safe bounds no longer exist. Aureline recenters it on the owning window and returns focus there on dismiss.

topology.starting_arrangement: owner window on primary display with a modal or sheet last shown on a removed display

must_not_happen: dialog is orphaned on a background or unreachable window
focus becomes trapped on an off-screen control
dismiss returns focus to document body instead of the owner

restorable_context: dialog purpose and safe action set
must_not_happen: a destructive confirmation is hidden off-screen

safe_recovery_actions: Move owner window to primary display
